title: stelmotis glomerata
intro: Stelmotis glomerata, also known as the clustered stelmotis, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, characterized by its clusters of small, yellow flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to contribute to its health benefits. The leaves and roots of the stelmotis glomerata plant have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, and are often prepared for consumption in herbal tea, infusion, or decoction. In some regions, the plant is also used to prepare a topical ointment or salve for treating skin conditions and wounds.
